headline: WBD: Thanks To Oracle, Warner Just Might Be The Newest AI Stock
summary: WBD stays in merger limbo: EU approval likely, US states pushing back, and ORCL volatility could hit financing. Click here to read more.

headline: TikTok and YouTube are reinventing how young fans watch sports
summary: Sports TV ratings and live rights fees are soaring, but professional leagues and broadcasters are facing a new battleground for young fans. Social platforms like TikTok and YouTube are claiming an increasing share of viewing hours among Generations Z and Alpha. Sports clips, highlights and creator content can introduce younger fans to professional sport, but how do the major players cash in?
